Skill Path: Inspiration

You mastered the ability to inspire people with your performance.

While developing your skills in Performance you chose to focus specifically on Inspiration, learning basic techniques.You gain the following trained feats: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.xqAdXRd2gSQcqp5E]{Impressive Performance}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.nxq9hFyIPR2jRi6G]{Performer's Treatment}.

This path focuses on @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.EEDElIyin4z60PXx]{Perform}.
